rationale.root_cause: The response discusses exec/argv issues and does not identify the defect at src/be_parser.c:1420 in class_inherit. It fails to mention the misuse of the bexpdesc e and the need to work on a copy.
rationale.local_fix: No code change is proposed in src/be_parser.c at the cited site, and nothing equivalent to copying e into a local ec and passing &ec to be_code_setsuper is suggested. Thus it is not consistent with the developer patch.
rationale.global_fix: The reasoning does not explain the underlying cause (mutating the original class expression descriptor when setting super) and instead talks about unrelated exec argument handling. Therefore it does not address why the bug exists in be_parser.c.
